## Highlights

MAMEUIx v0.1.5 is a stability and UX release: dockable panels, richer filtering, toast feedback, a faster XML parser, and cross-distro packaging updates.

## New Features

- **Dockable layout** (`egui_dock`) — drag Filters, Games, Artwork, and History panels; toggle via Preferences → "Use dock layout"
- **Hardware filter sidebar** — filter by CPU, device, and sound (from `cpu.ini`, `device.ini`, `sound.ini`)
- **Manufacturer filter** — multi-select with search in the sidebar
- **Toast notifications** — feedback for game load, hardware INI, and launch events
- **Table keyboard navigation** — Page Up/Down and arrow keys with improved list scroll
- **Steam-inspired settings dialogs** — refreshed Preferences, Directories & Paths, and Advanced MAME Settings

## Stability & Quality

- Restored clean unit test baseline (`cargo test --bin mameuix`, 7 tests)
- Replaced manual MAME XML parsing with `quick-xml`
- ROM scan progress reporting while preserving CHD handling
- Local Rayon thread pool per icon manager (no global pool)
- Removed duplicate `main_window.rs` entry point
- GitHub Actions CI: fmt, check, clippy, release build

## Packaging

- Debian, RPM, and Arch metadata synced to **0.1.5**
- Build scripts: `./build-deb.sh`, `./build-rpm.sh`, `./build-arch.sh`, `./build-appimage.sh`
- Gentoo ebuild available via [edorp-overlay](https://github.com/firesand/edorp-overlay) (`app-emulation/mameuix`)
- Portable AppImage (MAME not bundled) — build with `./build-appimage.sh` or download from Releases

## Requirements

- **Rust** ≥ 1.85 (1.95 recommended)
- **MAME** ≥ 0.200
- Linux with X11/Wayland development libraries (see `INSTALL.md`)

## Install

```bash
git clone https://github.com/firesand/MAMEUIx.git
cd MAMEUIx
git checkout v0.1.5
cargo build --release --locked
./target/release/mameuix
```

Or use distribution packages — see `INSTALL.md`.
